text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff! Just a hundred more meters!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Only one rival in my way to take down, and then
I win!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Yeah... I've got this! I'm gonna win! Just keep
going! Just... keep...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ah! ...Damn it! Damn it all straight to hell!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch, it's still only three o'clock.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I guess I'll do some work.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Starting today, I've got a trainer with me. I have
to start seriously preparing for my debut.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (It's finally beginning...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of training since Air Shakur
signed the trainer contract. Murmurs race across
the training track.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that person over there Shakur's trainer?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Really?! You mean that Shakur?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I saw her go off one time... It was terrifying.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I heard the teachers have a hard time with her
too, 'cause of how crazy smart she is.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta have either nerves of steel or be the literal
cream of the crop to take her on as a trainee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My heart begins to pound under the weight of the
curious gazes centering on me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just shut them out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Everywhere I go, I'm surrounded by extraneous
noise. If you let every little thing distract you,
there'll be no end to it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, so to speak. At any rate, even though
you're just here for show, it'll be a pain if you
start freakin' out.
choice_data_list: What do you mean I'm here for show?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Uh, just what it sounds like? I hope you're not
under the illusion that I expect anything out of
you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm running a simulation modeled on
estimations about my debut race.
choice_data_list: A... simulation?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tokyo Racecourse, left-handed, turf, 2,000
meters, cloudy, firm track...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Parcae has determined these to be the optimal
conditions for my debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Parcae is a computer that Shakur built to kick off
her racing career. She even engineered the OS
and programs herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shakur views the system as her training partner.
She collects data, then Parcae processes it into
training plans, which she trusts unequivocally.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna watch, that's up to you. Just don't
bother me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur moves to the inner lane, but hangs way
back, like she's trying to stay behind the pack.
Then, just as she approaches the final turn...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: HYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She accelerates toward the finish line. She runs
efficiently, with no wasted effort, yet with
determination. That honed power is truly
something to behold.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Exhale...
choice_data_list: That was a great run!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
That run would put me around fifth place.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Although, my optimal route doesn't have
anything to do with my debut race anyway.
choice_data_list: What's this optimal route, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Come here. I'll brief you on the races I'm planning
to run.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...There we go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur connects her computer to a monitor,
and the Parcae screen appears. A number catches
my eye right away.
choice_data_list:
What does the number 991031021222 in the
bottom right corner mean?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, that.
I'm not really sure.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No idea why, but it's been there ever since I had
Parcae plan my race schedule.
choice_data_list: Is that normal?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's not usually there, no. I can't seem to erase it
either, but you can just ignore it. It's not like it's
causing any problems.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's get back to discussing my racing
agenda.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The optimal route Parcae calculated is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Debut, and then follow up with the Hopeful
Stakes. Then the Satsuki Sho, Japanese Derby,
Kikuka Sho, and the Japan Cup for my classic
year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is a series of races that
Umamusume get only one chance to compete in.
It consists of the Satsuki Sho, the Japanese
Derby, and the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Anyone who manages to win all three is crowned
a Triple Crown champion, a title of uncontested
strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The most important race by far is the Japanese
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Parcae estimates that I'll lose the Derby by seven
centimeters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That seven is cold, hard data. Neither hard work
nor aspirations can overturn the harsh truth of
reality.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've tried swapping out data and inputting all
kinds of patterns, but that figure has never
budged.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: This must be what they call fate.
choice_data_list: Fate, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Even if I train to my absolute limit, and reach the
values Parcae is guiding me toward...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'll only be able to win the Satsuki Sho and the
Kikuka Sho. I still won't be able to break the
seven-centimeter gap in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Parcae is unable to determine a single route with
better results, which means there is none. But...
choice_data_list: We're just gonna have to find a way ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I've already looked everywhere. No stone
unturned.
choice_data_list: Maybe it's stuck to the bottom of your foot.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's a metaphor. As if I'd make such a stupid
mistake in my coding.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now, the reason I've been so thorough with my
explanation was to make sure you understand the
training plan.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
First off, I'm gonna raise my stats to the ideal
values for winning the Satsuki Sho and the Kikuka
Sho. I'll leave the how to you, so come up with an
appropriate training schedule.
choice_data_list: Me?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you. You remember that you're supposed to
be a trainer, right?
choice_data_list: I thought you said I was just for show?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: For now, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
However, you might prove to have a non-zero
amount of use as an unquantifiable influence—a
variable outside the equation.
choice_data_list: You think so?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You could be what leads to me overcoming the
unassailable seven-centimeter gap derived from
all my data. A miracle, in other words.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm kidding, by the way. But the fact remains that
I'm finished if I keep going the way I am now.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I need to at least consider the possibility that
you'll be able to turn the tables somehow.
choice_data_list: I'll do what I can!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Like I said, I'm not actually expecting anything
from you.
choice_data_list: I'll still try to be useful.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's a long shot, but do whatever you want.
Providing it doesn't actually harm me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, she's given me a chance to prove
myself. As such, I'd like to think about what I can
do, including in the long term.
choice_data_list: What's the "optimal route" for your senior year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For just a moment, a dark shadow flashes across
Air Shakur's eyes, but she recovers quickly.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Do you need to know that right now? Just focus
on what's in front of you.
choice_data_list: (I might not need to know, but...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like she's not telling me something
important. And I have a hunch that it's something
I should know as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: This conversation's over. Don't follow me.
choice_data_list: Could you at least answer my question first?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I don't want you causin' me any trouble out of
ignorance, so I'm sharing information on a
need-to-know basis.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I have no intention of tellin' you anything beyond
that. Honestly, even the seven-centimeter gap
issue doesn't really affect the process, so I didn't
really wanna talk about it.
choice_data_list: But that's the reason why we made our contract.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And there it is. This is exactly the crap I don't
want.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What would you even do if answered? If all you
can do is say, "Oh, I see," then there's no point.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Or do you think you can actually do something?
choice_data_list:
I can't think of anything if I don't know the
details.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list:
I'd prefer to know now rather than be left in the
dark.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All right, you want my optimal route for senior
year? There isn't one.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
According to Parcae's predictions, I'm not gonna
win a single race after the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to change the horrible future fate has
in store for me, I've gotta nip this problem right in
the bud.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I need to overcome the
seven-centimeter gap.
choice_data_list:
So that's why you're so focused on those seven
centimeters.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. It'd suck to put in a ton of work for
nothing.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: So... what're you gonna do to help? Pray for a miracle?
choice_data_list: Ooh, now things're getting exciting!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
Don't worry—I'm going to do my best to make
sure you win!

Don't worry—I'm going to do my best to make
sure you win!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, gross. I'm outta here.
choice_data_list: Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list: Let's change your destiny.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How can you say that with a straight face?
